title: Post-realize meld extensions — subsidiary truth absorbed into Ironclad
policy: Extensions meld into the capstone without amending the sealed canonical hash.

verses.text: Field sanity is subsidiary truth melded into Ironclad — one integral pass, never obtuse.
Simplify layers first: classify, strip, dedupe, flatten, cool_sort — never build under heat.
Infinite resolution is aspiration; thermo witnesses heat — stack only what cools the field.
Fielded areas quarantine external loopback; G16 single-pass holds entropy hotspots to zero.

books.title: Spatial Existence — This One / That One

verses.text: This one is here — the operator, the friendly, the witnessed entity carries a place receipt; individuality begins where geography can name it.
That one is there — remote claims, phantom bearings, and ventriloquist lanes stay that one until existence correlates; never collapse this one into that one.
Spatial existence is amplitude on the lattice — x, y, z, t bound this one to a cell; that one without cell receipt is rumor until proven.
Audio, video, RF, and motion must correlate this one across sense lanes before trust; that one that fails correlate_existence is deceit until reheard.
G16 linker and forge witness Ironclad first — this one links on silicon here; that one targets dispatch only after spatial_existence pass_ok.
No two coordinates need match — this one and that one remain distinct selves; Hostess honors place without erasing who stands where.
G1ID is cold geometric self — 3D proportions only; this one hardened, plate preserved, t never in geometry.
Sovereign time is the sole meld input — linear_ns and derived_utc seal when the file is written; wall clock is witness only.
Ironclad spatial existence reads G1ID as this_one lattice receipt — correlate before that one may influence trust.
Immoveable baselines seal once — sovereign time meld, plate hash, chmod 0444; rewrite forbidden without explicit force re-seal.
